SC2-CORROSIVE_SPINES.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] and [gold]Enchant[/gold] all Strikes with [gold]Corrosive[/gold].
SC2-CORROSIVE_SPINES.title: Corrosive Spines
SC2-UNSTABLE_GENE_PACK.description: At the end of combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards and [gold]Downgrade[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] random card.
SC2-UNSTABLE_GENE_PACK.flavor: The Swarm avoids localized optimizations by occasionally undoing what has worked.
SC2-UNSTABLE_GENE_PACK.title: Unstable Gene Pack
SC2-MUTALISK_HEART.description: Upon pickup, lose [blue]15[/blue] Max HP and take [blue]15[/blue] damage. Whenever you climb a floor, heal [green]4[/green] HP.
SC2-MUTALISK_HEART.flavor: It beats despite the lack of blood. Water it twice a day.
SC2-MUTALISK_HEART.title: Mutalisk Heart
SC2-ZERGLING_SWARM.description: At the start of your turn, deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to a random enemy for every Zergling. Start with [blue]3[/blue] Zerglings. Whenever you kill an elite, add [blue]3[/blue] Zerglings to the Swarm.
SC2-ZERGLING_SWARM.title: Zergling Swarm
SC2-ROACH_CLAW.description: Start each combat with [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. At the end of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
SC2-ROACH_CLAW.title: Roach Claw
SC2-LIVING_CARAPACE.description: Living Carapace can absorb card rewards to heal you [green]1[/green] HP. Every three absorptions, raise your max HP by [blue]10[/blue].
SC2-LIVING_CARAPACE.title: Living Carapace
SC2-EVOLUTION_SLURRY.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]10[/blue] random cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold], then give them random [gold]Enchantments[/gold].
SC2-EVOLUTION_SLURRY.flavor: Drink deep for the chance of becoming greater.
SC2-EVOLUTION_SLURRY.title: Evolution Slurry
SC2-EVOLUTION_SLURRY.infoText: Cards transformed and enchanted by [gold]Evolution Slurry[/gold]
SC2-ZERGLING_GLAND.description: You may Adrenal Overload at [gold]Rest Site[/gold].
SC2-ZERGLING_GLAND.flavor: Like a thousand caffeine shots pumping through your veins.
SC2-ZERGLING_GLAND.title: Zergling Gland
SC2-CREEP_TUMOR.description: [gold]Fatal Overkill[/gold] damage is converted to [green]Biomass[/green]. Increase your max {Energy:energyIcons()} by {level}. At [blue]{biomass}[/blue] [green]Biomass[/green], increase your max {Energy:energyIcons()} by 1 and increase the threshold by [blue]50[/blue].
SC2-CREEP_TUMOR.title: Creep Tumor
